title: callista oculata
intro: Callista oculata, also known as the eye pod or moon shell, is a species of sea snail whose shell is used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Callista oculata are attributed to its high concentration of saponins, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Callista oculata include decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
